pi_items.source: setup_data.py:192 - product template created with name 'Large Cabinet'; setup_task.sh:29 searches for this product; consistent across all scripts
task.json description field line 5 explicitly states 'set the Title to Cabinet Structural Defect'; verifier.py:40 checks for this exact value (case-insensitive); consistent across task definition
task.json description field line 5 explicitly states 'add the tag Structural'; verifier.py:41 checks for this tag (case-insensitive); task description and verifier are consistent
setup_task.sh:58 creates quality check with 'quality_state': 'fail'; task description mentions 'failed quality check'; verifier expects alert linked to the check with this state

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic Odoo 17 Quality module environment where data is generated by XML-RPC setup scripts. The target product is 'Large Cabinet', created in setup_data.py. The task requires creating a quality alert from a failed quality check for this product, setting the alert title to 'Cabinet Structural Defect' and adding the tag 'Structural'. The quality check is created with state 'fail' by setup_task.sh before the task begins.
